subcodes.title: A NIARING URE RA VINIVEL
subcodes.first_line:
## A NIARING URE RA VINIVEL

A vinevel na bura tara gai Kai Ala (Lolovina) tara  vavaurua nabung tuk tara uravinun na bu
subcodes.notes: Theory: Fasting prayer or instruction (section A NIARING URE RA VINIVEL = A Prayer for the Fast in Kuanua/Tolai language). Could be AB07124 (fast prayer) or BH01125 (fast instruction). Text describes not eating or drinking during daylight hours of the fast. Challenge: Kuanua is a Papuan language with very limited reference material.
